title: 10 best herbal tinctures for vaginitis
description: Aloe tinctures helps with vaginitis because of its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and calm irritated tissues in the vagina. The aloe vera plant contains compounds that have been shown to reduce inflammation and combat infections caused by bacteria, yeast, and other microorganisms.
